programme.desc: Jill (Patricia Richardson) accuses Tim (Tim Allen) of being insensitive after he ruins an honorary dinner with the library committee.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Balking at promoting a questionable product jeopardizes Tim's job.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim and Jill (Tim Allen, Patricia Richardson) have different plans for a monetary gift the boys have received. With Richard Karn.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: Eric takes exception to Donna's story about a fictional couple; Bob introduces his new girlfriend to Red and Kitty.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: Red tries to fix Eric up with Stacey, a new Pricemart checkout clerk, but he soon realizes that she's interested in someone else; Fez finally asks Big Rhonda out on a date.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: Eric's comely cousin visits, triggering competition for attention among the boys; Red gets Kitty a pet.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: Eric is forced to pal around with Hyde and his female "friend"; Red gives Pastor Dave a new direction in life.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: Eric agrees to direct the church's Christmas pageant, and the casting of his friends leads to disagreements over the interpretation.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: Jackie takes a job as a cheese maiden at the Cheese Palace; Eric catches Red combing through his dresser drawers.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: Eric braves a tornado watch to pick up Donna for the prom; the weather warning brings the Formans and Pinciottis together.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: All reminisce about meeting one another for the first time, as they prepare to get their class pictures taken.

programme.title: Rateescape: Stop Overpaying for Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Hear Better With Audien
programme.desc: Audien Hearing is a leader in over-the-counter hearing aids, committed to making high-quality hearing accessible to all. Discover how advanced, affordable solutions are helping more people experience better hearing every day.

programme.title: 1776 - 2026 250th Anniversary Quarter Celebration Program
programme.desc: 2026 will be one of the most historic years ever in U.S. coinage. Join your host Mike Mezack to learn about the incredible U.S. Quarter program and get a chance at an exclusive P&D Roll!

programme.title: Freedom to Leave the House! Inogen Portable Oxygen

programme.title: Never Scrub Your Floors Again
programme.desc: See why this cleaning tool replaces chemicals and hard labor!

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim (Tim Allen) wants to add a power-driven snowstorm to the Taylor's Christmas-card family photo. With Patricia Richardson.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: At Jill's (Patricia Richardson) high-school reunion, Tim (Tim Allen) meets her former boyfriend for the first time.

programme.title: Home Improvement

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim is Tarzan in Jill's fantasy; Ilene shares her sensuous dream with Al.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: It's one problem after another when Tim and Al go ice fishing.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: When Jill's (Patricia Richardson) retired father (M. Emmet Walsh) arrives for a visit, the house is transformed into a small military base.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim (Tim Allen) decides to separate Randy and Brad (Jonathan Taylor Thomas, Zachery Ty Bryan) when their arguing becomes too loud for his liking.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim and Al (Tim Allen, Richard Karn) each head up a Habitat for Humanity house-building project. Former President Jimmy Carter guest stars as himself.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.sub-title: Sober Sex, Plastic Silverware and Losing My Religion
programme.desc: Part of Becky's recovery program mandates she makes amends with people she has lied to over the years, leading her to meet up again with a former high school friend; Darlene visits with Pastor Phil; Louise continues planning her wedding.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.sub-title: The Wedding of Dan and Louise
programme.desc: A weather report forecasting that a tornado is headed for Lanford creates chaos and surprises on Dan and Louise's wedding day.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: On his birthday, Jim accuses Cheryl of habitually choosing gifts intended to change him instead of to please him.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Cheryl thinks she is attending a lingerie party given by Andy's new girlfriend, then learns the hostess is selling sex toys.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: At The Outdoor Man store, Mandy unintentionally causes a dispute between Chuck and Joe; thinking Vanessa needs to blow off some steam, Kristen and Eve invite her to their kickboxing class.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike and Vanessa eagerly await Eve's return from the Air Force Academy; Ryan's anxiety about current events leads to a shocking announcement.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: After avoiding expressing emotion after his dad died, Mike finally has the heart-to-heart with Bud that he never had while he was alive; Kristin proposes a new business venture; Mandy gives Kyle a makeover to fit his new corporate job.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Under the threat of corporate takeover, Mike and Ed disagree on the direction of Outdoor Man's future; Vanessa is elated when she thinks Mandy and Kyle are trying to have a baby.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: When Andi goes back to work and Adam stays home to take care of the kids, he discovers that they aren't well-behaved angels.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: Adam must choose between his brother and his wife when he receives two coveted tickets to a Steelers game.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Confident Jim is crushed when he loses a hot-dog-eating contest to a petite woman, and Andy compounds Jim's sorrow by deciding to date the winner.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: When Cheryl's respectable bachelorette party disappoints Dana, Jim and Andy treat Dana to a rowdy night she will never forget.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Dana and Cheryl worry when their respective partners Andy and Jim decide to take up some dangerous adrenaline sports.

programme.title: According to Jim

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: A role reversal occurs when Tim and Al host a cooking show, with Al as the star and Tim as the sidekick.

programme.sub-title: It Was the Best of Tims, It Was the Worst of Tims

programme.desc: Tim's (Tim Allen) Mother's Day plans for Jill (Patricia Richardson) go awry when he gives away a nostalgic swing set. Guest star: Victoria Principal.

programme.desc: Gracie's recent misbehavior makes Jim think she is lying about a friend giving her a new video game.

programme.desc: Andy resents a wealthy client (Nana Visitor), then ends up dating her.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Cheryl asks Jim to put the kids' artwork in storage, but he disposes of it elsewhere, thinking Cheryl will not notice.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim agrees to go to a couples seminar, hoping Cheryl will reciprocate by letting him go on a fishing trip with Andy.

programme.title: Rick Renner
programme.sub-title: Peter's Mess and the Naked Boy
programme.desc: How Jesus remedied Peter's mess; the power that raised a boy from the dead.

programme.title: You'll Get Through This
programme.desc: Max Lucado discusses trusting God.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: How Your Thoughts Shape Your Health
programme.desc: Did you know your thoughts affect both your body and your emotions? Discover how renewing your mind can bring better health, emotional balance and strength for everyday life.

programme.title: Dr. Jeremiah Johnston: Body of Proof
programme.desc: Acclaimed apologist and scholar Dr. Jeremiah Johnston sets out to show why Jesus' victory over death is central to a believer's faith.

programme.title: Stakelbeck Tonight
programme.desc: Host Erick Stakelbeck takes viewers around the world; from Jerusalem to London to Washington, D.C.; pointing beyond with cutting-edge commentary, analysis and interviews focusing on ever-changing events and why they matter.

programme.title: Joseph Prince
programme.sub-title: Boost Your Faith and Health With One Prayer
programme.desc: Don't settle for half the gift: Joseph says Jesus paid for your salvation as well as healing at the cross!

programme.title: Main Stage
programme.desc: The Erwins; the Gold City Reunion and Tribute Quartet; host Jason Crabb and the Isaacs.

programme.title: Jesus: The Game Changer
programme.desc: Karl Faase travels to the U.K., U.S., Singapore, India and Australia, interviewing authors, academics and modern-day game changers about how the life and teaching of Jesus changed the world and why it matters.

programme.title: Insights -- Israel and the Middle East
programme.desc: Discussing how AI is not only the future but increasingly the present, and how the guests believe Israel is at the forefront of this bold new world coming to fruition.

programme.title: Signs & Secrets of the Messiah with Rabbi Jason Sobel
programme.sub-title: The Signs and Secrets of Transformation (Part 2)
programme.desc: Rabbi Jason continues to break down the miracle at the wedding in Cana, piece - by - piece, to show individuals another layer to Yeshua's first public miracle.

programme.title: Praise
programme.desc: Erick Stakelbeck sits down with Hulk Hogan in Florida for a profound conversation about Hulk's newfound faith and powerful testimony. Join them as they explore the transformative journey that has led Hulk Hogan to a deeper connection with Jesus.

programme.title: Joseph Prince
programme.sub-title: Boost Your Faith and Health With One Prayer
programme.desc: Don't settle for half the gift: Joseph says Jesus paid for your salvation as well as healing at the cross!

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.sub-title: The Seven Churches of Revelation: The Church in Satan's City
programme.desc: A look at the church in Pergamos shows what happens when idolatry and compromise are allowed to seep into a congregation.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: How Your Thoughts Shape Your Health
programme.desc: Your thoughts matter more than you think. Learn how healthy thinking can impact your physical well-being and emotional health and help you live with greater peace and strength.

programme.title: Steven Furtick
programme.sub-title: Green Light at the Red Sea
programme.desc: Discussing how to persevere in the face of resistance and keep moving forward into a purpose.

programme.title: Joseph Prince
programme.sub-title: Boost Your Faith and Health With One Prayer
programme.desc: Don't settle for half the gift: Joseph says Jesus paid for your salvation as well as healing at the cross!

programme.title: Robert Jeffress
programme.desc: The teaching ministry of American Southern Baptist, pastor and television host, Robert Jeffress; he is a senior minister of the first Baptist Church in Dallas as well as a Fox News contributor.

programme.title: Life Today With James Robison
programme.desc: The author of "Trailer Park CEO" shares the ideas and habits that brought her from poverty to success, both literally and spiritually.

programme.title: BillyGraham.TV
programme.desc: Following three people whose lives were on the verge of disaster and who desperately needed something more.

programme.title: Rick Renner
programme.desc: Learning about the horrific treatment Jesus endured.

programme.title: Ron Carpenter
programme.desc: Ron Carpenter leads the Body of Christ to a new level and reaches out to the lost and hurting.

programme.title: Andrew Wommack: Gospel Truth
programme.desc: Andrew teaches Genesis chapters 1-2 verse-by-verse from his Living Commentary.

programme.title: Better Together
